englishDefinitions: (predicative) The needful thing: something suitable for the purpose.
(predicative) The desired thing: someone or something that is popularly favored.
persianTranslation: (مصدر) امر مطلوب: کسی یا چیزی که مورد پسند مردم باشد.
examples: This book isn't quite the thing.
I need a present for my friend, and I think this is just the thing.
Brewfest needs to become the''' thing at Rutgers.
"I'm a little confused why she's the thing,” McCaskill told CNN.
